source.title: The Gammas - NMA project
source.revision_id_note: Not captured: the Drive connector exposes file metadata but not the revisions collection. Identify this snapshot by modified_at_utc plus the export hashes below.

download.export_consistency: Verified: 19 pages in the PDF, 19 slides in the PPTX, both 720x405 pt, and both carry the slide-3 label edit ('Segregation <-> integration') that an earlier PDF export missed. That earlier export was discarded.
download.concurrent_editing_warning: The deck is under active multi-person editing. modified_at advanced five times during the 23 Jul session (12:26:42Z, 13:20:29Z, 13:35:54Z, and again before 15:05:07Z). Re-export and diff before treating any snapshot as current.

supersedes.reason: Deleted rather than kept. It froze an 18-slide state that lived about an hour, and two snapshots of the same afternoon of an actively edited deck are noise. The retained pair is one pre-transcription baseline (22 Jul, 15 slides) and this current state (19 slides).

delta_since_the_22_jul_baseline.summary: Jaime Pineda transcribed the final storyboard into the deck (slides 3-7 spoken, 9-12 backup) and a 'Backup' divider was inserted at slide 8. Valeria Moraga's original placeholder slides survive as the legacy tail at 13-16, followed by two 'Complementary Slides' dividers (17-18) and an internal compression map (19). Slide 2 is mid-edit: Arefeh, Valeria and Jaime now have real photographs, while Kerem and Goutham still carry template stock portraits, and the dummy roles are only partly replaced.

format_contract.note: Measured from this PPTX. It is the visual grammar every slide we add must follow so edits paste in cleanly. Canvas 720 x 405 pt.
format_contract.footer_band: Full-width rounded shape at y=380.5, height 24.5. Left text 'FC Reconfiguration in Working-Memory' at L=7.5 T=386.2 W=322.5 H=15, 9 pt. Right text 'The Gammas' at L=390.0, same box size, 9 pt. NMA logo picture centred at L~349, T=380.5, 24.7 x 24.5.
format_contract.slide_title: Text box at L=24 T=18 W=672, height 30-42, 16 pt.
format_contract.two_column_grid: Left column L=24 W=326.2; right column L=369.8 W=326.2; gutter 19.6; page margin 24.
format_contract.card_block: Rounded group, W=326.2, H=55.5, stacked on a 63 pt pitch.
format_contract.content_top: Charts and cards start at T=82.5 or below; T=60 for a section label.
format_contract.chart_widths_in_use: slide 5: 360.0, slide 6: 350.9, slide 9: 451.4, slide 10: 371.7 pt. All below the 460 pt minimum the storyboard asks for; see the storyboard note.
format_contract.theme: theme1.xml declares Arial for major and minor fonts, but no run sets a font name, so the rendered face comes from the Google Slides theme. Palette: dk1 #202729, lt1 #FFFFFF, dk2 #4BA173, lt2 #63D297, accents #353744 #424242 #616161 #999999 #FF5252 #FFF176. The cream page and sand footer are shape fills, not theme colours.

usage.role: Current state of the shared team deck, and the format reference for any slide we add
usage.numerical_verdict: Every value on the spoken and backup slides matches canonical_evidence.EXPECTED; the transcription introduced no numeric error.
usage.warning: Known defects still present: stock portraits and partial dummy roles on slide 2, personal email addresses on a deck that gets archived publicly, and the legacy tail on 13-19. This is a record of what was reviewed, not a corrected deck.
